rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF VIRGIL JACKSON
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Appearance required. Issues to include: 1) Notice of Demand was filed by W.C. Cox (assignee) alleging that many heirs were not identified in the petition, including a half-brother, and requesting that full bond be required and that proposed administrator be required to retain counsel, noting that petitioner Raul Jackson has no authority to request appointment. 2) The petition has the following defects (these have been posted in the tentative ruling for the 4/28/25 hearing): a. Item 6 is incorrect, as Item 3g(2) indicates that Petitioner is Decedent's nephew. Please read the instructions in Item 6 carefully. b. Relationship of Jurine Jackson to the decedent was not stated in Item 8. c. Petitioner was not listed in Item 8. d. Jurine Jackson provided a P.O. Box in the Duties and Liabilities filed on 3/28/25; however, a residential address is required. e. Consent to serve as personal representative must be filed by Jurine Jackson. f. Petitioner requests waiver of bond, but no waivers have been filed. g. Notice of Petition to Administer Estate has not been filed. h. A Notice of Demand was filed by W.C. Cox, which alleges that there are many heirs that were not listed in the petition. Remote appearances may be made. Please review Local Rule 14.1. The following information pertains to appearances by Zoom: WHEN ENTERING "YOUR NAME" ON ZOOM, BOTH THE FIRST AND LAST NAME, AS WELL THE CASE NUMBER, MUST BE INCLUDED. Meeting ID: 160 225 4765 Password: 514879 To appear by telephone through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252, and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF GWEN BARDWELL PUTNAM
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 6/4/25. Examiner's Notes emailed to Petitioner with the following issues: 1) The original will has not been filed. 2) The will is not self-proving. Proof of Subscribing Witness must be filed. 3) The phone numbers and addresses of both proposed executors must be listed in the Duties and Liabilities (DE-147). The form must be re-filed. 4) The following have not been filed: a. Proof of Publication b. DE-147S 5) The proposed order must be completed with the assumption that the petition will be granted as requested. 6) The petition is incomplete: a. Item 2d is incomplete (regarding bond). b. Item 5a is incomplete; please read instructions carefully. c. Item 5b Is incomplete. d. Item 8 does not indicate the relationship of those listed to decedent.
